infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NeuroPilot needs your location to remind you about tasks when you arrive at saved places.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: NeuroPilot needs background location access to remind you about tasks when you arrive at saved places.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: NeuroPilot needs background location access to remind you about tasks when you arrive at saved places.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: NeuroPilot needs your location to remind you about tasks when you arrive at saved places.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: NeuroPilot needs background location to send reminders when you arrive.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: NeuroPilot needs your location to save places and send arrival reminders.
